json: Use camelCase for all request and response fields.
resources: Use plural resource names: locations, lockers, bookings.
ids: Use id for public resource identifiers and suffix references with Id, for example lockerId and locationId.
statusEnums: Use uppercase enum values such as ACTIVE, CANCELLED, AVAILABLE, MAINTENANCE, and DISABLED.
datetime: Use ISO 8601 UTC date-time strings for all datetime fields.
avoidanceRules: Do not use BOOKED, OPEN, CLOSED, or OCCUPIED as permanent locker status.
Do not expose raw MongoDB ObjectId.
Do not use dynamic object keys in errors.
Do not over-nest beyond necessary ownership or discovery paths.
